label: Instruction Detail
description: Persistent detail panel for the selected instruction. Shows signal, instruction, fill, and discrepancy detail for the row selected in the pipeline table.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file; data comes via useInstructionsData().

0.6.note: Pure detail/selection panel; no async data fetch. Content driven by selectedInstruction derived memo from context.

0.7.note: Renders 'Select a row in the instruction pipeline table to view detail here.' when selectedInstruction is null.

0.8.note: No async fetch; error state not reachable in this widget.

l0.notes: All checks pass or N/A. Widget is purely reactive to context selection; no independent data fetching.

1.1.note: Data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook via selectedInstruction derived value.

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope(); filteredInstructions (which drives selectedInstruction lookup) is scope-filtered.

1.3.note: Org filter changes filteredInstructions; selectedInstruction is looked up within filteredInstructions so org change propagates.

1.4.note: Client filter cascades through scopeStrategyIds into filteredInstructions.

1.5.note: Strategy filter cascades the same way.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays result in unfiltered dataset in context.

1.7.note: No reference data constants defined in this widget; config constants live in lib/config/.

l1.notes: All 7 checks pass. Detail panel inherits full scope filtering through context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=yes (shows live selected instruction detail), paper=yes (selectedInstruction reflects '(Simulated)' tagged strategyType from context), batch=yes (only FILLED instructions are selectable in batch mode). All 3 modes applicable.

3.2.note: Widget reads selectedInstruction from context which is derived from filteredInstructions. The context (instructions-data-context.tsx:46) reads mode from useExecutionMode() and applies batch/paper transforms to filteredInstructions before selectedInstruction lookup.

3.3.note: Detail panel has no order/trade submission buttons — read-only display widget.

3.4.note: Human check: batch mode visual indicator visible in widget or layout header. Agent cannot verify visually.

3.5.note: Paper mode: selectedInstruction.strategyType will reflect '(Simulated)' suffix when context is in paper mode. Detail grid displays the tagged type.

3.6.note: No WebSocket, setInterval, or useEffect in widget file or data context. Detail panel is purely reactive to context state.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A (read-only panel). 3.4 deferred to human walkthrough.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers in instructions-detail-panel-widget.tsx or instruction-detail-grid.tsx. Widget is purely display.

4.2.note: No href links in widget file or InstructionDetailGrid subcomponent.

4.3.note: Human check: verify Signal Detail, Instruction Detail, and Discrepancy sections show all expected fields for each strategy type.

4.4.note: Human check: selecting a row in pipeline table populates detail panel; deselecting clears it.

4.5.note: No links to gated pages in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks performed inside widget render.

4.7.note: No tabs or collapsible sections in detail panel.

4.8.note: Human check: detail grid scrolls within panel bounds at minH=3; no overflow leaking.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.8 deferred to human walkthrough. 4.7 N/A.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategy types in INSTRUCTION_STRATEGY_TYPES. This widget serves as a detail view for any instruction selected in instr-pipeline-table. Registry IDs covered: DEFI_ETH_BASIS_HUF_1H, DEFI_ETH_REC_STAKE_HUF_1H, DEFI_UNI_LP_HUF_1H, CEFI_BTC_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_ETH_OPT_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_BTC_BASIS_SCE_1H, SPORTS_NFL_ARB_SCE_GAME, PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M.

5.2.note: Human check: verify InstructionDetailGrid shows all required fields (Signal Detail: time/direction/confidence; Instruction Detail: op type/notional/venue; Discrepancy: price diff/qty diff/slippage) for each strategy type.

5.3.note: Human check: detail panel auto-populates when instruction is selected in pipeline table.

5.4.note: Human check: 'No fill yet' section renders for PENDING instructions; discrepancy section populates for FILLED/PARTIAL_FILL.

5.5.note: Human check: full flow — select instruction in pipeline table → detail panel shows correct data.

5.6.note: Human check: detail grid renders correctly for defi (SWAP/LEND/ADD_LIQUIDITY), cefi (TRADE), and sports/predictions instructions.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented from strategy registry. All other checks deferred to human walkthrough.

l6.notes: Deferred to L6 pass after L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in instructions-detail-panel-widget.tsx or instruction-detail-grid.tsx.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file or InstructionDetailGrid.

7.3.note: Widget file is 21 lines; instruction-detail-grid.tsx is 72 lines; instruction-fill-status-icon.tsx is 16 lines. All well within 500-line limit.

7.4.note: Components PascalCase (InstructionsDetailPanelWidget, InstructionDetailGrid, InstructionFillStatusIcon), files kebab-case, hook useCamelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in any instructions domain file.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file or InstructionDetailGrid. No inline object/array literals in deps.

l7.notes: All mechanically-fixable L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred until i18n ships.

8.1.note: instructions-detail-panel-widget.tsx: no text-[...] violations. instruction-detail-grid.tsx: had 3 instances of text-[10px] — all replaced with text-caption. instruction-fill-status-icon.tsx: no violations. Fix applied in same session as instr-pipeline-table.

8.2.note: No p/m-[...] or gap-[...] arbitrary spacing in widget or subcomponent files.

8.3.note: Widget renders InstructionDetailGrid which uses only standard HTML elements and Tailwind tokens. No custom reimplementation of shared primitives needed for a data-grid detail view.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no img without alt, no input elements, no interactive divs in widget or InstructionDetailGrid. Widget is purely display. Human keyboard + screen-reader pass deferred.

8.5.note: Human check: renders correctly at minW=4/minH=3; overflow-y-auto on panel wrapper handles content overflow.

l8.notes: Agent-fixable 8.1-8.3 complete. 8.4 agent-grep clean; human pass deferred. 8.5 deferred.

keepSeparate.rationale: Detail panel is intentionally a separate widget to allow flexible preset layouts: 'instructions-default' (table only), 'instructions-with-detail' (table + panel side-by-side), 'instructions-full' (table then panel below). Merging would eliminate layout flexibility.

relationships.notes: selectedInstruction is set by row selection in instr-pipeline-table via setSelectedInstructionId in shared InstructionsDataContext. This widget is driven by that selection.

dataContract.notes: No independent data fetch; derives selectedInstruction from InstructionsDataContext which holds the filtered instruction list. Data staleness depends on context refresh cadence.

gaps: No real API wired; detail content limited to mock fixture fields
InstructionDetailGrid shows 3 sections (Signal/Instruction/Discrepancy) — no compliance, legs, or timeline sections yet (described in original widget description)
coverage.notes: The detail grid currently shows Signal Detail, Instruction Detail, and Discrepancy sections. The original description mentions 'legs, fills, compliance, and timeline' — these are not yet implemented and represent a gap for future development.

knownIssues: InstructionDetailGrid missing compliance, legs, and timeline sections described in original widget spec
No loading or error state reachable (inherited from synchronous mock context)

findings.description: instructions-detail-panel-widget.tsx + instruction-detail-grid.tsx — user-visible strings including section labels, field labels, empty state message. Not fixed until i18n ships.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: instruction-detail-grid.tsx:16,29,45 — text-[10px] in section header paragraphs (Signal Detail, Instruction Detail, Discrepancy labels).
findings.fix: Replaced all 3 instances with text-caption (0.6875rem = 11px, nearest semantic token in @theme inline). File changed in same session as instr-pipeline-table L8 pass.

findings.description: lib/utils/instructions.ts formatInstructionTimestamp() consumed by instruction-detail-grid.tsx for signal timestamp rendering — toLocaleTimeString('en-GB') without timeZone option falls back to browser local timezone, violating L7.5 UTC datetime reassignment.
findings.fix: Added timeZone: 'UTC' to toLocaleTimeString options in shared helper so signal.timestamp renders in UTC for detail-panel consumers.
